'''Machar Heng''' was a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A [[Subaltern]], he was charged by [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] to coordinate the Yuuzhan Vong's efforts with the [[Peace Brigade]] to locate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Heng was granted a small flotilla in his task.
